To the end of 2025, actions or interventions that have led to ongoing reductions in Scope 1 and 2 emissions have totalled 12.9% relative to the baseline year of 2019."},

The total number of events is less than prior year, with 27 tier 1 and tier 2 events in 2025 (38 in 2024)... there were sadly four workforce fatalities during the year – three at our recently acquired TravelCenters of America facilities and one at Thorntons."},
